name_en: B brand pure original hot 🔥 TB series 'KINGDOM'. Clean and sharp lines, the texture and beauty are super impressive, unintentionally high-end. The gold logo with glossy cowhide is simply retro. This style isn't common, has high recognition, good texture, and easy to match. Do you guys like it?😽 21 x 6 x 16 cm
